description: Four ±1 sequences of length 167 whose periodic autocorrelations sum to zero at all nonzero lags. Equivalent to flat total PSD = 668 in frequency domain. Connected to OFDM, radar waveforms, and compressed sensing.
mathematical_formalization: sum_i PAF_i(j) = 0 for j >= 1; equivalently sum_i |S_i(k)|^2 = 668 for all k

key_results.legendre_paf: PAF(j) = -1 for all j >= 1 (from single Legendre sequence)
